RITUALE gettext_error stmt: 3 depth: 3 loops: 0 calls: 0 source: RITUALE gettext_error(VERBUM message) REDDE GettextError

stmt: EVOCA rituale: gettext_error depth: 3 line: 34
source: EVOCA GettextError err

stmt: REDDE rituale: gettext_error depth: 3 line: 36
source: REDDE err
RITUALE gettext_catalog_new stmt: 5 depth: 3 loops: 0 calls: 2 source: RITUALE gettext_catalog_new(VERBUM locale) REDDE Catalog

stmt: EVOCA rituale: gettext_catalog_new depth: 3 line: 40
source: EVOCA Catalog cat

stmt: REDDE rituale: gettext_catalog_new depth: 3 line: 44
source: REDDE cat
RITUALE gettext_extract_quoted stmt: 33 depth: 10 loops: 2 calls: 11 source: RITUALE gettext_extract_quoted(VERBUM line, REX offset) REDDE VERBUM

stmt: SI rituale: gettext_extract_quoted depth: 10 line: 53
source: SI start >= n

stmt: DUM rituale: gettext_extract_quoted depth: 10 line: 50
source: DUM start < n ET CONIURA char_at(line, start) != 34

stmt: EVOCA rituale: gettext_extract_quoted depth: 10 line: 48
source: EVOCA REX n AD CONIURA len(line)

stmt: REDDE rituale: gettext_extract_quoted depth: 10 line: 54
source: REDDE ""
RITUALE gettext_split_first_line stmt: 4 depth: 5 loops: 0 calls: 4 source: RITUALE gettext_split_first_line(VERBUM content) REDDE GettextChunk

stmt: SI rituale: gettext_split_first_line depth: 5 line: 96
source: SI idx == -1

stmt: EVOCA rituale: gettext_split_first_line depth: 5 line: 95
source: EVOCA REX idx AD CONIURA find(content, "\n")

stmt: REDDE rituale: gettext_split_first_line depth: 5 line: 97
source: REDDE Chunk(content, "")
RITUALE gettext_commit_entry stmt: 19 depth: 9 loops: 0 calls: 11 source: RITUALE gettext_commit_entry(

stmt: SI rituale: gettext_commit_entry depth: 9 line: 109
source: SI CONIURA len(msgid) == 0

stmt: ALITER rituale: gettext_commit_entry depth: 9 line: 124
source: VINCIRE entry.singular AD msgid

stmt: EVOCA rituale: gettext_commit_entry depth: 9 line: 120
source: EVOCA PluralEntry entry

stmt: REDDE rituale: gettext_commit_entry depth: 9 line: 110
source: REDDE
RITUALE gettext_load_catalog stmt: 61 depth: 15 loops: 1 calls: 32 source: RITUALE gettext_load_catalog(VERBUM caminho, VERBUM locale) REDDE SPECULUM NIHIL

stmt: SI rituale: gettext_load_catalog depth: 15 line: 143
source: SI NON CONIURA exists(caminho)

stmt: ALITER rituale: gettext_load_catalog depth: 15 line: 218
source: SI mode == 1

stmt: DUM rituale: gettext_load_catalog depth: 15 line: 159
source: DUM CONIURA len(cursor) != 0

stmt: EVOCA rituale: gettext_load_catalog depth: 15 line: 150
source: EVOCA VERBUM cursor AD CONIURA read_all(caminho)

stmt: REDDE rituale: gettext_load_catalog depth: 15 line: 144
source: REDDE CONIURA Err GENUS(Catalog, GettextError)(CONIURA gettext_error("catalogo inexistente"))
RITUALE gettext_translate stmt: 4 depth: 5 loops: 0 calls: 3 source: RITUALE gettext_translate(Catalog cat, VERBUM chave) REDDE VERBUM

stmt: SI rituale: gettext_translate depth: 5 line: 242
source: SI CONIURA option_is_some GENUS(VERBUM)(found)

stmt: EVOCA rituale: gettext_translate depth: 5 line: 241
source: EVOCA SPECULUM NIHIL found AD CONIURA map_get GENUS(VERBUM, VERBUM)(cat.messages, chave)

stmt: REDDE rituale: gettext_translate depth: 5 line: 243
source: REDDE CONIURA option_unwrap GENUS(VERBUM)(found)
RITUALE gettext_translate_plural stmt: 9 depth: 7 loops: 0 calls: 5 source: RITUALE gettext_translate_plural(Catalog cat, VERBUM singular, VERBUM plural, REX n) REDDE VE...

stmt: SI rituale: gettext_translate_plural depth: 7 line: 250
source: SI CONIURA option_is_some GENUS(PluralEntry)(found)

stmt: EVOCA rituale: gettext_translate_plural depth: 7 line: 249
source: EVOCA SPECULUM NIHIL found AD CONIURA map_get GENUS(VERBUM, PluralEntry)(cat.plurals, singular)

stmt: REDDE rituale: gettext_translate_plural depth: 7 line: 253
source: REDDE entry.singular
RITUALE gettext_set_default_catalog stmt: 4 depth: 4 loops: 0 calls: 0 source: RITUALE gettext_set_default_catalog(Catalog cat) REDDE NIHIL

stmt: SI rituale: gettext_set_default_catalog depth: 4 line: 266
source: SI configured

stmt: EVOCA rituale: gettext_set_default_catalog depth: 4 line: 265
source: EVOCA VERUM configured AD OBSECRO gettext_builtin_default_set(cat.messages, cat.plurals)

stmt: REDDE rituale: gettext_set_default_catalog depth: 4 line: 267
source: REDDE
RITUALE t stmt: 1 depth: 3 loops: 0 calls: 0 source: RITUALE t(VERBUM chave) REDDE VERBUM

stmt: EVOCA rituale: t depth: 3 line: 0
source: stmt: EVOCA rituale: t

stmt: REDDE rituale: t depth: 3 line: 273
source: REDDE OBSECRO gettext_builtin_default_translate(chave)
